content:

title: 'He earns ₹40 LPA but works 3 hours?': Delhi entrepreneur flags parents’ concerns in AI era
description: According to Dhawan, advances in artificial intelligence have changed how quickly skilled developers can deliver results, reducing the need for visibly long working hours.
content: A LinkedIn post by Delhi entrepreneur Rohan Dhawan has triggered discussion around changing workplace norms after he shared an incident involving his 24-year-old nephew, who is a remote developer at a YC-backed AI startup and earns ₹40 lakh per annum... [3063 chars]

title: Trump appoints Zuckerberg, other tech titans to AI council
description: Donald Trump appoints Mark Zuckerberg and Jensen Huang to a council on artificial intelligence policy. Read more at straitstimes.com.
content:
WASHINGTON – US President Donald Trump has appointed Meta Platforms CEO Mark Zuckerberg, Oracle executive chairman Larry Ellison and Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang to a council that will weigh in on artificial intelligence policy and other issues.

title: AI model reads cardiac MRI scans with near expert accuracy
description: A Penn Medicine–led team has developed a first-of-its-kind artificial intelligence system that interprets cardiac MRI scans with performance approaching expert clinicians. Trained on more than 300,000 MRI video clips from roughly 20,000 patients, the model can assess heart function and diagnose dozens of diseases using only non-contrast imaging. The work was published in Nature Biomedical Engineering.

title: Pa. teens get probation after using AI to create fake nudes of classmates

title: SLB expands Nvidia partnership to develop AI infrastructure for energy sector
description: Oilfield services company SLB is deepening its collaboration with Nvidia. They will create artificial intelligence infrastructure and models for the energy sector. This move aims to help energy companies process vast amounts of data faster. The partnership will also focus on building modular AI data centres. This initiative seeks to drive efficiency and sustainability in energy operations.
